assertions.description: The analyzer raises pwr_flag_warnings for both +5V and GND, saying they have no power_out or PWR_FLAG. In fact, two PWR_FLAG symbols are present and properly wired.
The analyzer reports switches_on_matrix=63 but diodes_on_matrix=60. The 2 extra counted switches are optional 2u keycap alternate footprints, not additional matrix entries.
